title: Whispers of the Void
description: Dont Lisent to the Whispers of the Void :D
body:
# Features:
  
**Morally-driven questlines and dark evolution**
  
**Immersive atmosphere with custom sounds, shaders, and visuals**
  
**Lore-rich worldbuilding and dynamic exploration**

### Whisper of the Void is not just a modpack – it’s a voice calling from beyond, one that never stops whispering.
